steps.title: Keep title and name together
steps.content: The phrase names a linguist and then identifies that linguist as Diane Massam. Because the name is essential, no punctuation should separate the title from the name.

steps.title: Avoid unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: Choice A uses paired commas, Choice B uses one comma, and Choice D uses a colon; all wrongly interrupt the title-name unit. No punctuation belongs between the title and name. The answer is C.
